purpose: Compact public code map for reviewers. The full local graph lives in .understand-anything/ and is intentionally ignored.

primary_flows.name: No-key mock preview
primary_flows.purpose: Inspect ingest, UI, traces, and review flow without hosted provider keys.

areas.frontend: Ticket UI, configurator, admin, onboarding screens.
areas.backend/core: App config, analytics, orchestration, traces, replay.
areas.backend/providers: Hosted OpenAI/Gemini providers plus deterministic mock preview provider.
areas.pipeline: RAG steps: planning, retrieval, reranking, drafting, scoring, validation.
areas.scripts: Setup, smoke tests, performance smoke, demo doctor, evals, diagnostics.
areas.tests: Focused phase hardening tests plus legacy mega-suite coverage.
areas.configs/ab: Advanced experiment variants; not needed for the first demo.
